verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase that is N-terminally myristoylated and palmitoylated, anchoring it to the cytoplasmic (inner) leaflet of the plasma membrane. Its canonical localization is inner-leaflet of the PM and intracellular membranes. However, LYN has documented ecto-kinase display on the outer leaflet of tumor/cancer cells (cancer ecto-kinase), and inner-leaflet-anchored kinases with documented cancer-cell outer-leaflet display qualify as contextual/cell_state_induced under the pre-no checklist rules.
